review_title: Kind of must have tools for marketing automations
description: Overall it's brilliant, I will recommend WebEngage if you want to automate customer journeys and send hyper-personalised cross-channel communications to customers. We use to target our customers in all three channels depending on user behaviour.
author: Sushant K.
pros: UX is just fantastic; it makes it easy for anyone to get started. It's more inclined towards marketing and automation. The user journeys combined with cross-platform marketing are killer. We had literally improved some of our key product metrics like onboarding, churn etc just by sending personalised notifications/banners/offers using it's journeys.
cons: Product analytics can be improved a bit so that I don't have to pay a hefty price for multiple tools across this segment.

review_title: webengage for all you marketing automation and customer data platform needs
description: It has been great integration webengage with our website of customer journey analytics and i learnt a lot in this process , We moved to webengage from gamooga ab its very smooth transition easy to use for marketing team and fulfils marketing requirement
author: Bhagyashri G.
pros: 1.their customer data platform 2.its ease of integration with other tools like bigquery looker studio 2. Customisable dashboards
cons: Service - there support team is very difficult to handle they do not understand requirement

review_title: Review - Amit Desai - MyGlamm
author: Amit D.
pros: Panel is very user friendly and highly customized.
cons: Segment level reporting and funnels are not possible, majority of Analytics are based on Event and not on users

review_title: Engage your user with all channels with WebEngage
description: My experience with WebEngane is excellent. After analyzing WebEngage, we decided to go ahead with this tool. We don't require any additional tool any channel. WebEngage provide us all at one place. Now our customer journey is more powerful and our reach has increased dramatically.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: With WebEngage we get all channels like Email, Push notification, SMS, WhatsApp and many more at one place. We can use all this cannels to engage our audience. WebEngage comes with excellent Analytics feature. We data to check deep insights and can analyze for creating marketing Strategy.
cons: Found difficulty to create dynamic email templates. Very few pre-built email templates available in Library.

review_title: Seamless CRM Tool
description: All in all its a good tool for CRM Automation and helps us define user journeys effortlessly.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The Ease of User Journey Creation, Notification Delivery, Cross Channel Attribution and Analytics are some of the things that makes this tool better than many others in the market.Email Marketing in particular is better than othe
cons: The UI is a bit complicated to understand and needs a proper walkthrough from experts. Notification Delivery rates suffered when we achieved scale.

review_title: It is simple, affordable and effective to use WebEngage
author: Deepa K.
pros: It is easy to use WebEngage's platform. The best part of WebEngage is creating personalised Push notification with different layouts and customisation ability. With WebEngage we are also able to send Push (App and Web both), SMS, Email, WhatsApp to users under one platform.
cons: It takes more than usual time to create Live Segments. Face integration challenges. There is lack of Customer support post-integration.

review_title: Must use this tool for better customer engagement & retention
author: Dinesh K.
pros: WebEngage has been an invaluable tool for our business. We've been able to design logical workflows that help us engage with customers through push, SMS, and WhatsApp notifications. The platform is intuitive and easy to use, and the customer service team is always available to answer any questions and help you to solve your business problem to drive more conversions.
cons: The integration process can be a bit tricky some times require additional help from customer support, but the customer support team is always there to help me out. Overall, I'm very happy with WebEngage!

review_title: This is simply a great tool for marketing Automation.
description: - Customer re-targeting - Promoting flash sales to a large TG - Personalized communication
author: Mrinal S.
pros: - Comprehensiveness of offerings across multiple channels of communication - Great Support team. Niket our SPOC from Webengage has been available literally 24*7 to help us with our queries - Value for Money. Great pricing as compared to other tools in the market

review_title: As the name suggest, WebEngage is best for Website Engagement
author: Nitya K.
pros: WebEngage supports multiple channel WhatsApp, SMS, push, email, Google and Facebook all at one place. It help us to segment audience and identify user existence in top, middle or bottom of the funnel. Supports multiple GTM, API and SDK integration. WebEngage stores custum events performed by users and if required it support to export the data to google cloud platform.
cons: Creating Live segments takes more then the usual time. On Site-notification doesnt work exactly when it is required.

review_title: Great product for marketing automation & educating users
author: Deepank C.
pros: - User Journey is surely one of the best feature about this product. It serves as a single tool for all customer touch points with the use of segmentation and easy tracking of conversions. - Client support is excellent, and the support staff is available whenever you need them.
cons: - Better Analytics & Reporting - Ability to make changes in the Journey without having to stop it and then make changes along with functionality of A/B testing for journeys should be there.

review_title: Excellent product to combine all your marketing efforts
description: Focussed marketing campaigns to the users and all channels at one place.
author: Abhishek S.
pros: The great team behind the product, great support. The features are very good, let's us run campaigns in a very focussed manner.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Webengage is good in Online marketing Field
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Tempaltes and quick respone in events capturing
cons: Segmentation, Time take to create segment is pretty high

review_title: All-in-one software for marketing automation
author: Darshan S.
pros: It was one of the best platforms which provide CRM, Marketing automation, Email marketing, and campaign management options. Very simple and easy-to-use tool. The interface is also very user-friendly.
cons: Sometimes, downloading reports takes a lot of time. This needs to be worked on.

review_title: A simple & efficient Marketing Automation software
description: The simplicity of the UI helps in visualizing your CRM data in a way that will help you understand key gaps in your current workflow. It will then help you in creating automated workflows to build efficiencies. This is a great tool for marketers and will go a long way in boosting your organization's digital capabilities.
author: Mayank K.
pros: Customer analytics was a major pain point for us and Webengage really helped us in structuring our CRM data to build intelligence. Then it used that data to automate workflows basis user journeys with a very straightforward UI. A brilliant marketing automation tool.
cons: Decision making can also be automated with the data the tool collects. Webengage needs to upgrade itself and make direct recommendations to the business with the data it has collected. This will minimize human intervention and will increase productivity.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It helped improve our sales conversion by 65%!
author: Suhas R.
pros: We were on the lookout for a marketing automation tool for a couple of months when we finally found out Webengage. One of our primary criteria for the tool was the the tool needed to have integration with Segment.com. All of our data was already being passed onto Segment.com and we did not want to make another tech integration. Since Webengage had this integration, it was fairly simple to get started with Webengage. Webengage also offered a very useful and unique feature of customer journeys. This was our second criteria which we also could find in Webengage. We automate our marketing by defining rules such as, send SMS to a user if a user has signed up but not proceeded ahead within 5 days, wait for 2 days and then send an email, if user does not click this email, send a push notification, etc. This is by far our most used feature, which nicely incorporates all other features of Webengage.
cons: UI of the in-app and onsite notifications can be improved. Some of the conditions that are set for these notifications some time do not work which leads to users being shown the same notification multiple times.

review_title: Its a easy to use Software, with loads of features.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very easy to use and helps making marketing campaigns at run time. We don't need to depend on the tech team to build the campaign for us. With Web Engage this happens in a few mins.
cons: It does not have any feature to compute. Eg. Doing product price comparison's etc. I suppose its part of the upcoming features.

review_title: Our worn out hunt for THE email automation tool we wanted, ended with WebEngage
description: We really struggled to find an affordable automation tool for Email & SMS, that had good API support and an intuitive journey builder. WebEngage hits all the right notes for that. It packs the punch of big automation systems like Marketo, Eloqua or Responsys. But is much cheaper and tech stack is way more startup friendly. Post WebEngage, we have much better control over targeting when it comes to communication. By sending right content in the right context, we have seen improvements all across the funnel.
author: Aniket T.
pros: Mapping out a user journey which everyone from techies to PMs to content writers, could understand was very important to us as a business. Most tools swung one way or the other, made for developers or made for people who didn't care about APIs. WebEngage has best of both worlds, and the most awesome journey builder I've come across as a marketeer.
cons: The pricing model discourages experimentation and creates road-blocks in terms of on-boarding. For a tool which doesn't actually send emails / messages (they have integrations with all leading senders), the pricing is too steep based on number of active users / events you can send.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A platform which empowers marketing to create large scale campaigns without going to the developer
description: Cross device, cross platform, integrated and instantaneous campaigns on customer actions.
author: Soyinka M.
pros: User journeys is the main value generator for marketing guys. Allows cross device campaign set ups with perfect ease. Integration with Segment.io also makes life easier as most of the campaigns can be event driven. Client support is awesome
cons: The response time on dashboard UI is slow. The SDK is heavy to be integrated in client. But segment integration can take care of that. Still some code review is required on the app

review_title: Web-engage has capably delivered in helping us @ eXtra.com engage better with our customers.
author: Shahin R.
pros: Excellent customer targeting/re-targeting capabilities. Clear and precise dashboards and back office. Round the clock customer support. Quick time to market.
cons: Can improve on some extended functionalities and validations on forms which inturn would help build more intuitive surveys.

review_title: A good MarTech tool for beginners of SMEs (if they can afford it).
description: We were able to utilize our technology team for our core business; leaving martech related development to Webengage team.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use and set up journey's once their script and events are in place (no technical knowledge required).
cons: I don't see any ROI in this, it's too costly compared to features it provides. If you have decent tech team, you can custom build most of the features directly.

review_title: We are using WebEngage to monitor and educate our users.
author: Stewart R.
pros: Besides the immediate analytics it provides, my favorite feature is the ability to model user journeys and ensure that users are properly supported through their use of the software.
cons: The initial use is overwhelming with so many features available. In addition, based on my initial experience it also appears that every detail needs to be thought through and should the user's journey change, it requires a re-build of a new Journey when only an edit to existing Journey might be required.

review_title: Fantastic product, super supportive team..
author: Gaurav J.
pros: Big pros Customized segmentation Journeys Ability to do deep personalisation Super supportive team Deep understanding of ecom
cons: Segment generation should be real time Funnels can be more detailed. Cohorts can be more exhautive I understand above are part of the roadmap.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very good product
description: Single platform for Web and app, really good product,
author: Sumon C.
pros: Automated campaigns, notifications and one single platform for Web and app. I am using webenagge last 18 months and I am really satisfied
cons: Segments, it should be more simplified, we should able to choose users depending on the acquisition source (Google /Facebook /affiliate)

review_title: Great team to work with, I havent seen such good implemntation and post implementation support ever!
author: Harsh J.
pros: support team is great. the product is easy to use and does help in addressing some of the challenges.
cons: i would like to see a lot more analytics. it would lead to better rentention strategies all throughout.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Webengage enabled us to increase our conversion rate by automating retargeting campaigns
author: Anshul D.
pros: Ability to put across anything on website or run campaigns without dependencies on tech team. Also, the account managers are really helpful and provide all the implementation help.
cons: Some more ability to customization would be great. Or bigger set of templates in the gallery will enable users to be quicker in implementation.
